original_text: We maintain a Positive investment stance on Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN), supported by robust revenue growth trajectory and significant profitability expansion over the past three fiscal years. FY2025 revenue is projected to reach $716.9 billion, representing approximately 12.4% growth versus FY2024 revenue of $638.0 billion [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc, CHUNK_ID: 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e]. Operating income has demonstrated dramatic expansion from $12.2 billion in FY2022 to $68.6 billion in FY2024, with FY2025 projected at $80.0 billion [CHUNK_ID: bc591e33-ea87-4e39-a4cb-9ca56789b93e, CHUNK_ID: 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e, CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc]. EBITDA generation has strengthened considerably, with FY2025 EBITDA projected at $165.3 billion, up from $123.8 billion in FY2024 [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc, CHUNK_ID: 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e].
revised_text: We maintain a Positive investment stance on Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN), supported by robust revenue growth trajectory and significant profitability expansion over the past three fiscal years. FY2025 revenue is projected to reach $716.9 billion, representing approximately 12.4% growth versus FY2024 revenue of $638.0 billion [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc, CHUNK_ID: 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e]. Operating income has demonstrated dramatic expansion from $68.6 billion in FY2024 to $80.0 billion in FY2025 [CHUNK_ID: 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e, CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc]. EBITDA generation has strengthened considerably, with FY2025 EBITDA projected at $165.3 billion, up from $123.8 billion in FY2024 [CHUNK_ID: 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc, CHUNK_ID: 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e].
changes_summary: Removed the unsupported FY2022 operating income claim ($12.2 billion) that cited chunk bc591e33-ea87-4e39-a4cb-9ca56789b93e, which is not available in the evidence chunks. Revised the operating income sentence to focus only on FY2024-FY2025 figures ($68.6 billion to $80.0 billion) which are fully supported by the available chunks 4a8ce233-eda6-4a1f-abcb-9e2306c3e8dc and 7f42935f-2962-4418-812e-c92a56b27b2e. All other claims and figures remain unchanged as they were already properly supported.
